absorption: ASK absorption at 62200. Aggressive buyers are being absorbed by a large passive seller (509 lot offer wall), causing the upward move to fail.
dom_observation: Large stacked ask wall at 62200 (509 lots) is holding the price. Buyers are hitting it but price is not advancing, followed by sellers stepping in.
reasoning: Fiyat, vPOC ve 62200'deki buyuk ask duvarindan ASK absorption ile reddedildi, pozitif delta sonrasi gelen guclu negatif delta (-86) donusu teyit ediyor.
